channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: PwC Study Reveals Investors' Optimism on Global Economic Growth and AI Adoption
item.description: A recent PwC study reveals that investors are optimistic about global economic growth, with 53% anticipating an increase in the next 12 months. The study also finds that three-quarters of investors believe generative AI tools will boost productivity and drive business growth.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Commvault designa a la veterana de la industria Ha Hoang nueva CIO
item.description: Nueva incorporación a la cúpula directiva de Commvault. El proveedor de soluciones de ciberresiliencia y protección de datos para la nube híbrida ha anunciado el nombramiento de Ha Hoang como su nueva directora de sistemas de la información (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The CIO is on the verge of burnout
item.description: The daily grind of working in an unhealthy workplace can take its toll on many levels, including mental health.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Jackbox Games to Launch on Smart TVs in Spring 2025: A New Era for Party Gaming?
item.description: Get ready for the ultimate party gaming experience! Jackbox Games is finally launching on smart TVs and other platforms in spring 2025, bringing its popular multiplayer games to a bigger screen.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Mark Kelly fires back at Musk over 'traitor' accusation
item.description: Sen. Mark Kelly (D-Ariz.) hit back at tech billionaire Elon Musk after he called Kelly a "traitor" for visiting Ukraine and demanding the United States stand with Ukrainians in their ongoing war with Russia.
item.dc:creator: Ailia Zehra, The Hill

item.title: HUD is eyeing a crypto experiment. Some government workers are concerned
item.description: This story was originally published by ProPublica. The U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development is considering taking a first step to using cryptocurrency, according to a meeting recording and other materials reviewed by ProPublica and three officials familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: Jesse Coburn, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk is claiming that the social media platform is being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.
item.dc:creator: Michelle Chapman And Barbara Ortutay, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Elon Musk says X outages caused by cyberattack
item.description: Musk hypothesized on his platform that "Either a large, coordinated group and/or a country" were responsible.
item.dc:creator: Ashley N. Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Databricks’ new updates aim to ease gen AI app and agent development
item.description: Data lakehouse provider Databricks is introducing four new updates to its portfolio to help enterprises have more control over the development of their agents and other generative AI-based applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump: Administration talking to 4 groups about possible TikTok sale
item.description: President Trump said Sunday his administration is in talks with four groups about a potential TikTok sale, with less than a month until a ban on the popular video-sharing platform is set to go into effect.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft previews AI chat template for .NET
item.description: Microsoft is previewing a .NET web app template intended to enable quick development of AI-powered chat applications. Part of an ongoing effort to make AI development with .NET easier to discover and use, the AI Chat Web App template was announced March 6.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Driving best value pricing – Let’s go for a ride
item.description: This blog will focus on requirements in the context of the federal government. Sound requirements drive best value pricing and performance for customer agencies The post Driving best value pricing – Let’s go for a ride first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Roger Waldron, Federal News Network

item.title: IT execs need to embrace a new role: myth-buster
item.description: One of the most dangerous trends arising from the combination of access to generative AI (genAI) tools, the cloud, and mobile apps is how easy it is for a line-of-business chief to do an end-run around IT and deploy all manner of things.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 7 Slack apps for file sharing and collaboration
item.description: Slack is a powerful tool for collaborative chatting among co-workers, as well as brainstorming, task management, and more.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Startup Fractile tackles AI inference bottlenecks with new chip design
item.description: A 29-year-old entrepreneur with a Ph.D in robotics is looking to shake up the AI chip industry with an innovative approach that promises to deliver hardware that is 100 times faster, 10 times cheaper, and 20 times more energy efficient than the Nvidia GPUs that dominate the market today.
item.dc:creator: Network World
